metadata.s2_source: Sentinel-2 L2A via Microsoft Planetary Computer
metadata.soil_source: USDA SSURGO (Candler fine sand, HSG A)
scenarios: flash_1hr_100yr: 1-hr, 100-yr ARI (1% annual exceedance), peak at 30 min

properties.name: Shallow Flood Zone (5–50 cm) — Flash 1-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Flash 1-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-2%/year | Depth range: 0.1-0.5 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Moderate Flood Zone (0.5–1.5 m) — Flash 1-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Flash 1-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-1%/year | Depth range: 0.5-1.5 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Deep Flood Zone (> 1.5 m) — Flash 1-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Flash 1-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-1%/year | Depth range: 1.5-10.0 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Shallow Flood Zone (5–50 cm) — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-2%/year | Depth range: 0.1-0.5 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Moderate Flood Zone (0.5–1.5 m) — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-1%/year | Depth range: 0.5-1.5 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Deep Flood Zone (> 1.5 m) — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr
properties.description: Flood Zone — Sustained 12-hr 100-yr | M9: Flood Risk = 1-1%/year | Depth range: 1.5-10.0 m | Source: 2D local-inertia simulation (LISFLOOD-FP method)

properties.name: Very High Flood Risk Zone (HAND < 0.5 m)
properties.description: Very High Flood Risk Zone (HAND < 0.5 m) | M9: Flood Risk = 5-10%/year | Source: HAND (Height Above Nearest Drainage) from USGS 3DEP LiDAR

properties.name: High Flood Risk Zone (HAND 0.5–1.5 m)
properties.description: High Flood Risk Zone (HAND 0.5–1.5 m) | M9: Flood Risk = 2-5%/year | Source: HAND (Height Above Nearest Drainage) from USGS 3DEP LiDAR

properties.name: Moderate Flood Risk Zone (HAND 1.5–3 m)
properties.description: Moderate Flood Risk Zone (HAND 1.5–3 m) | M9: Flood Risk = 1-2%/year | Source: HAND (Height Above Nearest Drainage) from USGS 3DEP LiDAR
